pi_items.source: Mathematical verification: 30 days × 24 hours/day × 60 minutes/hour × 60 seconds/minute = 2,592,000 seconds. Confirmed by task specification which explicitly states 'Set the Persistence Lifetime to exactly 30 days (you must calculate and enter this value in seconds)'. Standard Magento 2 configuration stores persistent shopping cart lifetime in seconds (https://docs.magento.com/user-guide/customers/persistent-shopping-cart.html)

Task specification in task.json explicitly states 'Update the Send Emails To recipient to support@luma.com'. Email format is valid (RFC 5322 compliant). Consistent with company name 'Luma Inc.' referenced in task description. Standard Magento 2 configuration path is contact/email/recipient_email (https://docs.magento.com/user-guide/customers/customer-account-create.html)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring Magento store operations with two verified key requirements: (1) Persistent Shopping Cart 'Persistence Lifetime' must be set to exactly 2,592,000 seconds, which equals 30 days - a mathematically verified conversion (30 × 24 × 60 × 60 = 2,592,000), and (2) Contact Us email recipient must be updated to 'support@luma.com', a valid email address format aligned with the Luma Inc. company context. Both values are derived from explicit task specifications, not external data sources. The environment is a synthetic test/demo Magento 2 installation with pre-configured store settings that the agent must update according to these exact specifications.
